title: Recent U.S. Assessment Found an Attack on Iran Unlikely to Result in Regime Change
summary_full: Intelligence officials have been skeptical that a popular uprising could dislodge the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps, which controls much of Iran’s security apparatus.
summary_public: Intelligence officials have been skeptical that a popular uprising could dislodge the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps, which controls much of Iran’s security apparatus.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: dislodge the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps
